SELECT DISTINCT s.Name, s.Location
FROM stadium s
WHERE s.Stadium_ID IN (
    SELECT c.Stadium_ID
    FROM concert c
    WHERE c.Year = '2014'
)
AND s.Stadium_ID IN (
    SELECT c.Stadium_ID
    FROM concert c
    WHERE c.Year = '2015'
);
final.answer_text: The stadium where concerts happened in both 2014 and 2015 is Somerset Park, located in Ayr United.
